name: Prompt Engineering vs Context Engineering
description: A panel debate exploring when prompt engineering is enough and when you need full context engineering. Panelists compare techniques, trade-offs, and real-world results — from one-shot prompts to CLAUDE.md files, MCP integrations, and agent architectures.
targetAudience: AI developers and practitioners who use LLMs daily and want to level up from prompt tweaking to systematic context design
prerequisites: basic experience using an LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)
